overview: Scient Institute of Technology (SIT), established in 2001, is a private engineering college located in Ibrahimpatnam, Hyderabad, Telangana. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University Hyderabad (JNTUH) and approved by AICTE, the institute is known for its serene 26-acre campus and focus on technical education. It has been granted UGC Autonomous status and is managed by the Scient Educational Society.
accreditation: NAAC Grade 'A+' with 3.45 CGPA; UGC Autonomous; Approved by AICTE; ISO 9001-2000 Certified.

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (CSE, ECE, EEE, IT, AI & ML)

placements.companiesVisited: Accenture, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Amazon, IBM, Infosys, Tech Mahindra
placements.internshipHighlights: Internships available from 2nd year; students placed in companies like Toucan Payments and Silicon Labs

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are primarily based on rank secured in TS EAMCET (for B.Tech) and TS ICET (for MBA), followed by state-level counseling (Category A). Management quota (Category B) seats are filled based on merit/JEE Main scores.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions follow the TS EAMCET and TS ICET counseling schedules, typically starting May-June.

campus.specialNote: The campus is noted for its 'sylvan surroundings' away from city congestion.

hostelFees.5SharingNonAC: Private hostels nearby range from ₹5,000 – ₹6,000 per month

contact.address: Scient Institute of Technology, Nagarjuna Sagar Highway, Ibrahimpatnam, R.R. District, Telangana
contact.cityOffice: 3-2-848/9-11, Opp Hotel Mahaveer, Kachiguda Station Rd, Kachiguda, Hyderabad, Telangana – 500027 | Phone: 040-65594666

scholarships.meritScholarships: Fee waivers available for top rankers in TS EAMCET.
scholarships.fullWaiver: Available under Central Sector Scheme for eligible meritorious students.
scholarships.partialWaiver: 50% tuition fee waiver for students securing top ranks.
scholarships.governmentAid: TS ePASS fee reimbursement (up to 100% tuition fee) for eligible SC/ST/BC/EBC/Minority students with income limits (SC/ST < ₹2L, others < ₹1.5L-₹2L).
